db.element: div#jobsByConnection > div > div > table > thead > tr > th:nth-of-type(2)
comments.content:
`Affects 6.2 CU4 SP3 and Under`

The Timezone of the Job Monitor typically reports their results in UTC.

A **hotfix** exists to show the Job Monitor with **Application Timezone** (Settings -> Application Timezone)

Ticket #210917
comments.author: sprashker@securonix.com
